description: Geeky Orchestration plugin hooks — guard edits to frozen planning artifacts. Default mode is warn (advisory, surfaced via portable stdout+stderr). For a hard block, change the command to append --mode block (emits Claude/Codex deny JSON). Runs the Python hook via hooks/py-run.sh, which probes python3 → python → py -3 so the same line works on Windows, macOS, and Linux without assuming a specific interpreter name. To prefer PowerShell on Windows: pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/guard-planning-contract.ps1" -Mode warn
